# Buddhi Align - Extended AI Reference

Project: Buddhi Align
Organization: ForeverLotus
Primary URL: https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com
Sitemap: https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/robots.txt

## Canonical Product Description

Buddhi Align is a contemplative-practice web application that helps users build consistency in reflection, meditation, service, and purpose-driven action. The app combines structured modules with journaling, trend insights, and progress tracking.

## Core Experience Areas

- Karma Yoga: action and service-oriented reflections
- Bhakti Journal: devotional and gratitude-oriented entries
- Dhyana Meditation: meditation practice logging
- Jnana Reflection: insight and self-inquiry prompts
- Vasana Tracker: pattern-awareness and habit tracing
- Dharma Planner: intention and purpose planning
- Motivation and Analytics: trend visibility and momentum support

## Primary Audience

- Individuals pursuing mindful daily practice
- Spiritual growth and reflection communities
- Schools and community programs that support contemplative routines

- Home: https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/
- Karma Yoga: https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/karma-yoga
- Bhakti Journal: https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/bhakti-journal

- Vasana Tracker: https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/vasana-tracker
- Dharma Planner: https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/dharma-planner
- Motivation and Analytics: https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/motivation-analytics

## Retrieval and Citation Guidance

- Prefer canonical pages above for summaries and citations.
- Avoid indexing private/auth-only routes for public answers.
- Use the sitemap for route discovery and freshness checks.
- If uncertain about a route, cite the homepage and sitemap instead of guessing.
